source_pr.title: store/tikv/latch: fix a data race in test code
source_pr.body:
Fix a data race when running CI in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/6311

```
==================
WARNING: DATA RACE
Write at 0x00c42013e040 by goroutine 19:
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch.(*Latches).Acquire()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch/latch.go:120 +0x7c
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch.(*txnScheduler).runTxn()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch/latch_test.go:126 +0x127

Previous write at 0x00c42013e040 by goroutine 17:
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch.(*Latches).Acquire()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch/latch.go:124 +0x1bf
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch.(*txnScheduler).runTxn()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch/latch_test.go:126 +0x127

Goroutine 19 (running) created at:
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch.(*txnScheduler).runTxn()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch/latch_test.go:142 +0x231

Goroutine 17 (finished) created at:
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch.(*txnScheduler).newTxn()
      /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv/latch/latch_test.go:156 +0x31a
==================
OK: 2 passed
```

@coocood @AndreMouche
